QuiX Quantum is pleased to announce its membership in QuantumBW and Photonics BW, two leading Baden-Württemberg networks driving collaboration across quantum technologies, photonics, research, industry and technology transfer.

interaction_phrase: established an office in Stuttgart at ARENA2036
occurrence_sentence: As a Dutch-German deep-tech company, QuiX Quantum is already actively engaged in the Baden-Württemberg regional innovation ecosystem. The company has established an office in Stuttgart at ARENA2036 and has a local presence in Ulm, where its first universal photonic quantum computer will be delivered to DLR QCI.

interaction_phrase: welcome QuiX Quantum to the QuantumBW network
occurrence_sentence: "We are pleased to welcome QuiX Quantum to the QuantumBW network. With its focus on photonic quantum computing and its growing presence in Baden-Württemberg, QuiX Quantum adds an important industrial perspective to our ecosystem.

interaction_phrase: welcome QuiX Quantum as a member
occurrence_sentence: "We are delighted to welcome QuiX Quantum as a member of Photonics BW. Photonics is a key enabling technology for the next generation of quantum systems, and companies like QuiX Quantum demonstrate how optical technologies can be translated into scalable, industrial quantum solutions.

"Strong ecosystems are essential to bring quantum technologies from research into industrial application. QuantumBW and Photonics BW connect the right capabilities across science, industry and technology transfer. We are proud to become part of these networks and look forward to contributing to an even stronger photonic and quantum ecosystem in Baden-Württemberg, the Netherlands and across Europe," said Robin Wittland, Chief Commercial Officer at QuiX Quantum.

"Strong ecosystems are essential to bring quantum technologies from research into industrial application. ARENA2036 welcomes the QuiX Quantum team to the ecosystem! The Dutch-German company takes Europe's leading position in the field of photonic quantum computing and enriches the research campus with another key technology.
QuiX Quantum is already working closely with the German Aerospace Center (DLR) and the University of Stuttgart, both of which are also members of ARENA2036.
